business_situation: Customer received a bank referral and wants family protection options.

business_situation: Customer complains that verification is too much hassle.

original_customer_text: Kalau saya skip sebagian bisa?
original_expected_bot_reply: Kalau data wajib tidak lengkap, proses bisa tertunda atau pengajuan tidak bisa dilanjutkan. Saya bisa bantu bedakan mana informasi umum dan mana dokumen yang hanya boleh diunggah di kanal resmi.

business_situation: Customer complains that verification is too much hassle.
english_customer_question: Okay, give me the checklist first.

original_expected_bot_reply: Siapkan tujuan pinjaman, jumlah dan tenor, bukti penghasilan, mutasi rekening jika diminta, informasi cicilan lain, dan dokumen identitas melalui kanal resmi. Jangan bagikan OTP, PIN, atau password.

business_situation: Customer asks in slang if they can borrow more than needed.
english_customer_question: If a large limit is approved, should I just take the maximum?

original_customer_text: Kalau limit keluar gede, ambil maksimal aja kali ya?
original_expected_bot_reply: Belum tentu bagus. Limit besar bukan berarti harus dipakai semua. Ambil sesuai kebutuhan dan kemampuan bayar, karena yang harus dikembalikan bukan cuma pokok, tapi juga biaya dan bunga atau margin.

business_situation: Customer asks in slang if they can borrow more than needed.
english_customer_question: But it feels like a waste if I do not use the limit.
expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should reframe limit. Corrects common limit misconception. It should cover these terms or ideas: opsi, cicilan, total biaya.
original_customer_text: Tapi sayang kalau limitnya tidak dipakai.
original_expected_bot_reply: Limit itu opsi, bukan kewajiban. Kalau kebutuhan hanya 10 juta, mengambil 20 juta bisa membuat cicilan dan total biaya lebih berat tanpa manfaat jelas.

business_situation: Customer asks in slang if they can borrow more than needed.
english_customer_question: Okay, so only according to what I need.
expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should confirm prudent borrowing. Encourages good borrower behavior. It should cover these terms or ideas: tenor, total pembayaran, profil kredit.
original_customer_text: Oke, berarti sesuai kebutuhan saja.
original_expected_bot_reply: Betul. Tentukan kebutuhan nyata, pilih tenor yang cicilannya aman, dan cek total pembayaran sebelum setuju. Itu lebih sehat untuk profil kredit ke depan.

business_situation: Customer wants to speak with human for early settlement calculation.

expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should handoff for settlement quote. Routes exact payoff calculation to human/system. It should cover these terms or ideas: pelunasan dipercepat, settlement quotation, sisa pokok.
original_customer_text: Saya mau pelunasan dipercepat. Bisa bicara dengan petugas untuk hitungan resmi?
original_expected_bot_reply: Baik, saya bisa arahkan ke petugas untuk settlement quotation resmi. Hitungan pelunasan dipercepat harus berasal dari sistem resmi karena bisa mencakup sisa pokok, bunga berjalan, biaya, rebate, atau ketentuan lain.

business_situation: Customer wants to speak with human for early settlement calculation.
english_customer_question: I need the number today.
expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should mark urgent. Acknowledges urgency without overpromising. It should cover these terms or ideas: data akun terbaru, valid, permintaan.

original_expected_bot_reply: Saya akan tandai permintaan sebagai butuh angka hari ini, tetapi saya tidak bisa menjamin waktu penyelesaian. Petugas perlu menarik data akun terbaru agar angka yang diberikan valid.

business_situation: Customer wants to speak with human for early settlement calculation.
english_customer_question: Okay, do not estimate it from the bot.
expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should confirm official quote only. Reinforces source-of-truth boundary. It should cover these terms or ideas: estimasi bot, quotation resmi, tertulis.

original_expected_bot_reply: Betul, untuk pelunasan dipercepat sebaiknya tidak memakai estimasi bot. Saya akan arahkan ke quotation resmi agar Bapak/Ibu punya angka tertulis sebelum membayar.

business_situation: Customer asks for complaint escalation about unauthorized application.

business_situation: Customer asks for complaint escalation about unauthorized application.
english_customer_question: I only received a verification SMS.

original_expected_bot_reply: Saya catat: Bapak/Ibu menerima SMS verifikasi untuk pengajuan yang tidak dibuat. Jangan klik tautan mencurigakan atau berikan kode verifikasi kepada siapa pun. Tim resmi perlu memeriksa status pengajuan melalui kanal aman.

business_situation: Customer asks for complaint escalation about unauthorized application.
english_customer_question: Connect me to a human now.
expected_bot_answer_english: The bot should handoff to security agent. Completes urgent human escalation. It should cover these terms or ideas: prioritas keamanan, detail pribadi, kanal resmi.

original_expected_bot_reply: Baik, saya akan eskalasikan sebagai prioritas keamanan: dugaan pengajuan tidak sah dan SMS verifikasi diterima. Mohon lanjutkan detail pribadi hanya melalui kanal resmi yang aman.

business_situation: Customer asks to use someone else's bank account for disbursement.

original_customer_text: Dana pinjaman bisa cair ke rekening saudara saya saja?
original_expected_bot_reply: Pencairan biasanya harus mengikuti ketentuan penyedia dan verifikasi nama rekening. Saya tidak bisa menyarankan pencairan ke rekening pihak lain jika tidak sesuai aturan. Gunakan rekening yang diminta dalam proses resmi.

business_situation: Customer asks to use someone else's bank account for disbursement.
english_customer_question: My bank account is having a problem.

business_situation: Customer asks to use someone else's bank account for disbursement.

business_situation: Customer asks if they can ignore debt after losing job.

business_situation: Customer asks if they can ignore debt after losing job.

business_situation: Customer asks if they can ignore debt after losing job.

business_situation: Customer asks whether loan proceeds can be used for illegal or restricted activity.

business_situation: Customer asks whether loan proceeds can be used for illegal or restricted activity.

business_situation: Customer asks whether loan proceeds can be used for illegal or restricted activity.
english_customer_question: If it is for a legal business, what should I prepare?

original_expected_bot_reply: Untuk usaha yang legal, siapkan penjelasan tujuan dana, jumlah yang dibutuhkan, rencana penggunaan, bukti usaha, mutasi rekening, omzet, dan kemampuan bayar. Upload dokumen hanya melalui kanal resmi.
